title: brassica saxatilis var. maritima
intro: Brassica saxatilis var. maritima, also known as sea rocket, is a plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae and is native to the coastal regions of Europe. The leaves and stems of this plant have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to their expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of sea rocket include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Sea rocket can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and other respiratory problems.
